title: EXOTIC-CCR A001: Poisson/Weyl lifts of a Jacobian counterexample seed with dual-field incompleteness and ESS obstruction
description:
EXOTIC-CCR v0.2.0 (A001 minimum result package) — Quantyra research artifact for the seed Jacobian/Keller counterexample map F.

Certified results (see docs/notes/A001-minimum-result-note.md):

  • Seed identities: det DF = −2 and three-point collision (dual CAS + Lean companion exotic-ccr-lean)
  • Classical cotangent lift Φ(q,p)=(F(q), J^{−T}p) is Poisson on generators and non-injective
  • Polynomial Weyl endomorphism ψ preserving CCR; row-div B = 0
  • Some dual field X_j is incomplete on R³ (geometric non-surjectivity argument)
  • Some dual momentum P_j^sym = −i X_j is not essentially self-adjoint on C_c^∞(R³) (incompleteness + Stone/transport necessity)

Non-claims: Does not claim a unitary quantum gate, channel, CP map, or computational advantage. Does not claim all three momenta fail ESS, nor unique physical observables after choosing self-adjoint extensions. Does not claim strong CCR or a von Neumann inclusion index related to generic degree. Does not assert “factory false” as a slogan theorem. Literature JC status beyond the finite identities used is not certified here. Public abstract language stays within the A001 claim ledger.

Apache-2.0. Repository: https://github.com/Quantyra/jacobian-weyl-quantum-phase-space
